decision: Record the candidate recommendation for each complete interpretation item without promoting any rule before Flamestrike review.

decision_items.candidate_rule_summary: Preserve originals and use a later dimension-locked, component-aware rectification sub-gate with full distortion records and no averaged scale.
Build C-001 from rectified normal-owner silhouettes with faceted ruled transitions and no new extrema beyond 120 x 90 x 220 cm.
Keep C-002 and C-003 as separate nested masonry courses; rectify within the 35 cm base span and interpret only unowned seams.
Preserve source-owned C-004 rubble edges and close only unowned gaps by contained straight chords inside the 140 x 110 cm envelope.
Keep C-005/C-006/C-007 decoration face-owned, assert no cross-face continuity, and add no hidden-face motif by default.
Preserve visible contacts and close components independently with minimum bounded overlap wholly inside source-invisible contact volume.
Seal the interpreted C-004 footprint with a flat undecorated underside at the authoritative Z=0 ground station.
Use separate watertight C-001 through C-004 primary components and keep C-005 through C-007 as face-owned decorative systems unless later promoted by source-visible need.
Use the midpoint of the direct C-004 width/depth endpoint roles at Z=0 as an explicitly interpreted production origin and pivot.
Extend the approved normal-owner axes into dominant-normal surface ownership; treat ties as explicitly interpreted transitions and keep perspective non-metric.
